content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changed source files (milestone_record/service.rs, project_run_record/service.rs, project_run_record/queries.rs, adapters/fs.rs, cli/run.rs, tests). The implementation correctly adds plan-hash provenance checking to all four query types (run history, task detail, bead execution history, milestone task listing). Key design: plan-derived fields (bead_title, acceptance_criteria) are only projected when the task/run's persisted plan_hash matches the current plan.json on disk, preventing stale metadata after plan evolution. Fallback views always include milestone_id, milestone_name, and bead_id. The load_plan_bundle function now validates bundle identity and semantic validity. The serialization change (removing skip_serializing_if for milestone_id/bead_id) ensures consistent JSON schema with null values for non-milestone tasks. All 97 relevant unit tests pass, clippy is clean (-D warnings), and cargo fmt --check passes. Test coverage includes: stale plan hashes, missing plan hashes, mixed plan hashes across retries, corrupt plans, missing plans, wrong bundle identity, short vs qualified bead ID matching, and backward-compatible null lineage. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
